race.comment: MOULIN MISS (8) loves this course and distance winning two from two attempts and gets the services of Maloney to navigate from the awkward draw. Ready to find her best now fourth run back from a break and should be right there at the business end. NEIL (9) has won two of four over this distance range and will be high on confidence following that last-start Gosford victory. Can go back-to-back. CINDERSEA (5) is two from two around this circuit and gets some weight relief with the 2kg claim. Racing very honestly of late and can make her presence felt again. BLUE SPINEL (10) has won over this track and trip and will be rock-hard fit for this. In the mix on best figures. HIDDEN MELODY (2) rounds out the selections from the inside alley.
